text:
syslog-ng 3.2.1 released
BalaBit IT Security, 2010. november 27., 9:35
Hi, After 2 alpha and a beta release Ive decided to declare that syslog-ng
OSE 3.2 is now stable, and thus Ive released 3.2.1, the first in the 3.2.x
series. This version has the largest list of features even since the syslog-ng
project was born, so make sure you check out all the goodies. The [...]

http://git.balabit.hu/?p=bazsi/syslog-ng-3.2.git;a=summary
